input.query: Where is a roving reading service stopping near a healthcare waiting area?
documents: The library van now parks outside the clinic every Tuesday. Patients can borrow large-print novels and return them at the pharmacy counter.
In the memory ward, residents sang familiar choruses while a guitarist kept a steady tempo. Nurses noted calmer evenings after the sessions.
The island school replaced its diesel generator with roof panels and a battery shed. Evening classes continued even when fuel boats were delayed.
